content.en:
"So, the Dark Forbidden is not the only ancestor I've seen?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes, it's true that there are more than these ancestors, I don't know how many ancestors there are!" the Realm Ancestor said, "If the Ancestor is hidden, no one will be able to find it. And at the beginning of the birth of the Dark Forbidden Domain, no one knows how many good things were born. It is said that before the birth of the Dark Destruction Domain, a considerable number of those sleeping ancestors were top ancestors, and after endless long years, one by one they could not progress, and they did not want to leave the Dark Forbidden Domain, so they slept on their own one by one, waiting for a new opportunity! The birth of the Dark Holy Land was not of much value to them, after all, compared to the entire Dark Forbidden Land, the Dark Holy Land was just a treasure land, and it was very valuable to ordinary ancestors, but for those top ancestors, the value was not necessarily very high. Holy Ancestor, Destruction Ancestor, belongs to the ranks of the top Ancestor who is weaker, if the top Ancestor is divided into the strongest Ancestor, the Destruction Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor are still very far away from the Supreme Ancestor, so some of the treasures in the Destruction Holy Land are still quite useful to them, which can improve their cultivation, so they are keen to compete for the treasure opportunity of the Dark Holy Land. If they reach the extreme of the top ancestor, they can't be promoted to the top ancestor, and they can't even progress in the future, maybe one day they will fall asleep on themselves, or leave the dark forbidden realm, or break into the six forbidden places, and have a chance!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Indeed, if a top ancestor has been unable to break through and has lived for too many years, life is no longer meaningful to such an ancestor.

At this time, if they don't break into the six forbidden lands with death, then they can only sleep, wait for a long time, and then wake up, maybe the dark forbidden domain will give birth to the strongest ancestor, then they will have hope to break through.

"Ten Thousand Law Ancestor, not long after you broke through to the Ancestor, you have the top Ancestor combat power, you can continue to cultivate, and when your strength is close to the Supreme Ancestor, you can go to some forbidden places under the six forbidden lands, although it is a little dangerous to the top Ancestor, but there is still a great hope of surviving, maybe you can get some opportunities. At the moment, you must not enter the Six Forbidden Lands!" the Realm Ancestor reminded.

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, the Realm Ancestor left.

And Ye Tian took a deep look at the Calamity Black Mountain, and left here.

In the following days, Ye Tian went to see the six forbidden places respectively, but they all looked at the outside world and did not enter.

Just looking at it from the outside, he felt the aura of terrifying death, as if he would fall if he entered.

......

"It's better to improve the cultivation of the ancestor, it hasn't been a long time since I broke through to the ancestor, you can continue to improve your cultivation, let's cultivate the time and space of annihilation first, cultivate the time and space of annihilation with the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, and block the breath of the time and space of annihilation, other ancestors should not be able to perceive it." Moreover, the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm completely belongs to the human race, and other ancestors will not come here to investigate, so it should be very safe!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Although he was not afraid of the Holy Ancestor and the Destruction Ancestor, if the news that he was able to cultivate the Silent Destruction Time and Space leaked, it would not be a good thing for him to attract the attention of some sleeping top ancestors.

Therefore, it is better to be cautious for now.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian cultivated a top-notch Silence Time and Space in the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm, and a large amount of resources were invested in the Silence Time and Space to cultivate the Silence Destruction Treasure.

Then, Ye Tian refined these Silent Treasures and continuously improved his cultivation.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength steadily improved.

A realm year, a realm year, just like that.

When Ye Tian's cultivation was growing, he would also try to create more Ultimate Ancestral Techniques.

For example, the defense of the ultimate ancestral skill can be stacked completely.

Ye Tian created the Ancestral Armor Ultimate Ancestral Technique, but he could also create a second defensive Ultimate Ancestral Technique, such as the Dao Yi Ultimate Ancestral Technique, condensing a Dao Armor and covering it on his body to resist attacks, similar to this Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

For example, the same is true for the speed class Ultimate Ancestor Skill, and the body method type Ultimate Ancestor Skill plus the Wing Class Speed Ultimate Ancestor Skill can also be stacked.

In the same way, the same is true for the Time Ultimate Ancestral Skill, he can make another Ultimate Ancestral Skill that accelerates his own time, which is equivalent to skyrocketing his speed, reaction, and attack power.

Once he has more Ultimate Ancestral Skills, his own strength will be even stronger.

And so.

Ye Tian continued to create an ultimate ancestral technique.

In the blink of an eye, ten realm years had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian created five ultimate ancestral techniques.

These five Ultimate Ancestral Skills are the Golden Wing Ultimate Ancestral Technique, the Dao Yi Ultimate Ancestral Technique, the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Technique, the Dream Butterfly Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and the Hands of Annihilation Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

Among them, the Extreme Arm Ultimate Ancestral Technique is to exert a terrifying effect on one arm, which is even more terrifying than the Hegemony Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and the two Ancestral Skills have a weak superimposed effect.

Dream Butterfly Ultimate Ancestral Skill is the Time Ultimate Ancestral Skill, which can quickly speed up its own time, which is equal to its own speed and reaction are extremely fast, and the speed is fast, the attack power will naturally be stronger, so this Ultimate Ancestral Skill will help Ye Tian's strength a lot, if it is combined with the Eternal Ultimate Ancestral Skill, it will directly freeze time and space, and the effect will be better.

The Hand of Annihilation is the Ultimate Ancestral Technique of Silence Annihilation, and it is the Ultimate Ancestral Technique created by Ye Tian from scratch, that is, because he has the Ultimate Ancestral Skill of Silence, he can create such an Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and the entire Dark Forbidden Domain is afraid that there is only this Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

After creating these five Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, coupled with the Ultimate Ancestral Techniques he had mastered before, as well as the Immortal Treasures that Ye Tian had continuously refined over the past ten realms, his strength had already undergone earth-shaking changes.

"My current strength is at least twenty times stronger than when I first broke through to the top ancestor, I should have reached the peak of the top ancestor now, and I can easily defeat the Destruction Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If he cooperated with the replication of the body, it would be enough to kill the Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor.

Moreover, his Aoba Ancestor clone's cultivation has also improved a little, and coupled with the increase of several Ultimate Ancestor Techniques, he has barely stepped into the top Ancestor combat power.

And stepping into the top Ancestor combat power, the power increase of the Dark Soul Domain has decreased a lot, and even with the power increase of the Dark Soul Domain, the combat effectiveness is far inferior to the main body.

"Yue'er, they are about to break through to the Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.
